title: Staged spine CLI candidate-id wiring smoke test
problem: Ticket-258 added focused unit coverage for `_staged_rank_candidate_ids`, but there is no small CLI smoke test that validates orchestrator fixture-mode path wiring against candidate-id selection on a temp DB.
